name: Bard: Spell Suite — Heroism + Hold Person save-to-end + Healing Word + Vicious Mockery
description: A level 5 College of Lore Bard solos a Skeleton Archer (HP 13, vulnerable bludgeoning) and a Bandit (HP 11). Tests (1) Heroism: concentration, Frightened immunity + recurring temp HP = CHA mod (4) at start of each turn, (2) Hold Person on Bandit (humanoid) with queued failed WIS save -> Paralyzed + auto-crit from melee within 5ft, (3) end-of-turn repeat WIS save with queued PASS (15) -> Paralyzed removed per Phase 0.1 saveToEnd primitive, (4) Healing Word self-cast for 2d4 + CHA (2024 baseline healing dice), (5) Vicious Mockery cantrip cleanup on Skeleton. Per RAW 2024 — scenario is expected to EXPOSE gaps: GAP-8 (Hold Person save-to-end hardcodes WIS 0 and bypasses QueueableDiceRoller) may prevent the passed save from registering, and Vicious Mockery is not in the spell catalog.

character.comment: Solo Bard L5 College of Lore. CHA 18 (+4), proficiency +3, spellSaveDC 15, spellAttackBonus +7.
character.name: Lyra

monsters.comment: Skeleton Archer — undead, bludgeoning vulnerability. Low HP (13).
monsters.name: Skeleton Archer

monsters.comment: Bandit — humanoid (Hold Person valid). Positioned adjacent to Lyra so Paralyzed auto-crit from melee applies.
monsters.name: Bandit

actions.comment: R1: Cast Heroism on self. Concentration, immediate + per-turn temp HP = CHA mod (4), Frightened immunity.
=== ROUND 2: Hold Person on Bandit with queued failed save ===
Pre-queue Bandit's WIS save: 1 -> 1+0 = 1 < DC 15 -> FAIL -> Paralyzed.
R2: Cast Hold Person on Bandit. Consumes L2 slot. Concentration switches to Hold Person (Heroism drops).
R2 melee: Rapier attack on Paralyzed Bandit within 5ft -> auto-crit per RAW.

input.text: I attack the Bandit with my Rapier

actions.comment: Attack hits (Paralyzed grants advantage; melee within 5ft = auto-crit on hit).
Crit damage: 2d8+2 rapier. Roll 10 -> 12 dmg, kills Bandit (HP 11).

=== ROUND 3: Bandit's end-of-turn save (if still alive/relevant) — since we killed Bandit in R2, skip straight to Skeleton cleanup. Test the Phase 0.1 saveToEnd primitive on the wider picture: Heroism's temp HP should be gone since concentration switched. ===

R3: Vicious Mockery at Skeleton Archer. WIS save DC 15 (Skeleton WIS -1 needs 16+). On fail: 1d4 psychic + disadvantage next attack. Skeleton has bludgeoning vuln — not relevant to psychic dmg. Cantrip scales to 2d4 at L5.

input.text: cast Vicious Mockery at Skeleton Archer

actions.comment: R3 bonus: Healing Word on self. 2d4 + 4 (2024 baseline). Consumes L1 slot.
